notes:
NEW CHAMPIONS
Phyla-Vell
Descendant of the Captain Marvel lineage, Phyla-Vell uses her Kree and artificially created Eternal physiology to protect the cosmos. While fighting the Phalanx, Phyla became the Avatar of Death to save her romantic partner Moondragon, gaining new abilities and her new title: Martyr. 

Shatterstar
Shatterstar, Gaveedra Seven, is a mutant gladiator from the Mojoverse and the time-travelling son of Longshot and Dazzler. Due to his time in the Mojoverse, Shatterstar became

title: Water Out Puzzle®
notes:
Hi friends!
We’ve been listening closely to your feedback, and we’re thrilled to share some exciting updates in this version:
- More Localized Languages: We added localization support for even more countries.
- New Levels & Mechanics: We’re introducing more levels and fresh content to explore.
- Improved Experience: We’ve polished the interface and visuals for Daily Rewards, the Prime Pass, and the Home Screen to make everything smoother and more delightful.

And this is just the beginning—more
